title: MCSM Music Pack
description: Replaces all of Minecraft’s music with tracks from Minecraft: Story Mode. By Antimo & Welles.
body:
**Bring the world of *Minecraft: Story Mode* into your game.**
This resource pack replaces all in-game Minecraft music with atmospheric, emotional, and cinematic tracks from *Minecraft: Story Mode*, composed by **Antimo & Welles**. It covers menus, creative mode, the Nether, the End, and more — giving your world a nostalgic, story-rich vibe. Should go well with mods & resource packs like CWSM, Story Mode Style, Etc...

You can make suggestions on our Discord too!

### **Features:**

* 🎵 Full music replacement from *Story Mode*
* 🌍 Works in all dimensions (Overworld, Nether, End, etc.)
* 🎧 Accurate track naming and in-game banner display support (1.21+)
* 💾 Compatible with 1.20.1 and up to 1.21.1


# Recommended on newer versions: Change Music Frequency in Music & Sound Options to Frequent!
![Music Frequency: Frequent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e6248af299e08e085f45f073c18b84de60d813f.png)

**This is because the tracks from MCSM are much shorter than the vanilla tracks.**
